design.label: Web & Product Design
design.description: Design HTML artifacts, token specs, brand-style templates, quick mockups, and iteration loops.

diagrams.label: Diagrams & Infographics
diagrams.description: Architecture diagrams, hand-drawn excalidraw, and 21x21 layout-style infographics.

video.label: Video & Animation
video.description: ASCII video, Manim 3Blue1Brown-style explainers, and TouchDesigner control.

creative-coding.label: Creative Coding
creative-coding.description: p5.js sketches, kinetic typography, terminal ASCII art, and ComfyUI image gen.

writing-music.label: Writing & Music
writing-music.description: Strip AI-writing patterns, generate Suno music prompts.

claude-design.description: One-off self-contained HTML artifacts (landing, deck, prototype) with verified browser output. CLI port of Anthropic's hosted Claude Design.

design-md.description: Author / lint / diff / export Google's DESIGN.md token-spec files.

popular-web-designs.description: 54 ready-to-paste design systems (Stripe, Linear, Vercel, Notion, Airbnb, etc.) for paste-ready HTML/CSS.

sketch.description: 2-3 disposable single-file HTML mockup variants for side-by-side design comparison.

visual-iteration-loop.description: Meta-skill for navigating multi-turn design iteration (Fix-vs-Look mode, declare-vs-ask).

architecture-diagram.description: Dark-themed inline-SVG cloud/infra architecture diagrams as one self-contained HTML file.

excalidraw.description: Hand-drawn .excalidraw JSON files (arch, flow, sequence, concept maps).

baoyu-infographic.description: infographic.png from any of 21 layouts x 21 styles.

ascii-video.description: Colored ASCII MP4/GIF (video-to-ASCII, audio-reactive, generative, hybrid, TTS).

manim-video.description: 3Blue1Brown-style Manim CE explainer videos with optional voiceover.

touchdesigner-mcp.description: Drive a running TouchDesigner instance via the twozero MCP for real-time visuals.

p5js.description: Single-file HTML p5.js sketches (gen art, shaders, interactive, 3D, audio-reactive).

pretext.description: Text-flow / reflow / kinetic typography demos with @chenglou/pretext.

ascii-art.description: Terminal ASCII art (pyfiglet, cowsay, boxes, toilet, image-to-ASCII, QR, weather).

comfyui.description: ComfyUI image generation control and node pipeline authoring.

humanizer.description: Rewrites text to strip 29 AI-writing patterns and add genuine voice.

songwriting-and-ai-music.description: Suno custom-mode packages (style description + metatagged lyrics) for original songs or parodies.
